pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm typing this. everything just fell apart today. the lab results were a disaster and the funding is gone. three years of my life just... gone. i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this research. i'm just so tired. i'm so incredibly tired of trying to fix things that are clearly broken.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room only grows heavier. He is gone. The promises he whispered in the moonlight were nothing but poison, and now I am left with nothing but the hollow ache of his betrayal. It feels as though the very air is too thick to breathe, too heavy for a soul as broken as mine. I find myself staring out at the black expanse of the moors, thinking how easy it would be to simply... wander into that mist and let the world forget I ever existed. To just fade away into the night and find the stillness I so desperately crave.
